basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning.

work.summary: Research internship focusing on large language models and machine learning.
Research internship at Tencent WeChat Group, working on vision-language models for chart understanding.
Research internship focusing on NLP and evaluation of large language models.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: A framework for generating large-scale logical reasoning data with verifiable correctness.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: Investigates the perception bottleneck in vision-language models for understanding charts.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: Discovers a universal truthfulness hyperplane inside LLMs and proposes methods to detect and mitigate hallucinations.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Uses inner representation sharpness as an early alert mechanism for hallucination detection.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: A multi-level multi-discipline Chinese evaluation suite for assessing foundation models.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Composes parameter-efficient modules (e.g., LoRA) with arithmetic operations to create new capabilities without retraining.
